summary: Iteration 4 - missing-birds private report feature: 23/23 new backend tests pass; 85/85 regression tests pass. Full frontend lifecycle verified end-to-end (public report → admin sees → notify → mark-found → close → delete). Privacy isolation confirmed: reports never leak into /api/found-birds, /api/posts, /api/public-birds, /galleri, or /hittade-faglar. Admin stats include missing_searching / missing_found. UI: sidebar 'Bortflögna (privat)' link positioned correctly between Registrerade fåglar and Hittade fåglar; landing hero CTA + header link both present and functional; ReportMissing form has all required data-testids including privacy-notice banner; success dialog with 'Rapporten är skickad' title works and 'Till startsidan' navigates to /.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1420 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, admin, public, posts, missing_birds) for maintainability.
MissingBirdInput does not validate last_seen_date format (accepts any string). Consider using date type or regex for ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
PATCH /admin/missing-birds does not clear found_at when status is changed back from 'found' to 'searching'; document/decide desired semantics.
notify endpoint accepts empty message (message: None) — intentional but note that UI can produce an empty notification record.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows verified: form submit, success dialog, admin tabs, notify, mark-found, close, delete, sidebar nav, privacy isolation)

seed_data_creation: Created + deleted several TEST_-prefixed missing-bird reports during tests. All cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Missing-birds feature fully validated end-to-end. New test file /app/backend/tests/test_missing_birds.py added. Privacy confirmed by explicitly checking public endpoints do not return reports. If future iterations touch this area, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_missing_birds.py and the regression suite (backend_test.py, test_posts_moderation.py, test_gallery_and_my_birds.py) — all currently green.
